mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_ai_source (title, category, description, original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, file_extension, mime_type, file_size, file_hash, storage_provider, extracted_text, parse_status, index_status, error_message, access_scope, access_department_id, min_role_level, status, version, uploader_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{description}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileExtension}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{storageProvider}, #{extractedText}, #{parseStatus}, #{indexStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{accessScope}, #{accessDepartmentId}, #{minRoleLevel}, #{status}, #{version}, #{uploaderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE oa_ai_source SET access_scope = #{accessScope}, access_department_id = #{accessDepartmentId}, min_role_level = #{minRoleLevel}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_ai_source WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash} LIMIT 1
